title: Dortmanna inflata
taxonomy: Dortmanna inflata is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This family is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the loosestrife family. Members of the Lythraceae family are typically found in aquatic or wetland environments. They are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Dortmanna inflata, in particular, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
